title: Risk Review Meeting — 2025-11-15
text:
# Risk Review Meeting — 2025-11-15

**Attendees:** Tyler Moss, Lena Okafor, Marcus Thaine

## Summary

This page covers the battery chemistry evaluation for the Airframe subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.

## Actions

- Follow-up with Priya Nair on outstanding items.
